zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey II de Bohun於1109年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾梅爾可善姆時，他的父親Humphrey de Bohun I30歲，母親Maud de Salisbury21歲。他於1138年與Margaret of Gloucester在英國賀福爾賀福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1165年享年56歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humphrey II de Bohun于1109年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾梅爾可善姆时，他的父亲Humphrey de Bohun I30岁，母亲Maud de Salisbury21岁。他于1138年与Margaret of Gloucester在英国賀福爾賀福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1165年享年56岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bohan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Connor, John Patrick, Brendan, Liam.
Irish (Leitrim): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhacháin, from a personal name which is a diminutive of buadhach ‘victorious’.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey II de Bohun was born in 1109, in Melksham, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Humphrey de Bohun I, was 30 and his mother, Maud de Salisbury, was 21. He married Margaret of Gloucester in 1138, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1165, at the age of 56, and was buried in Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey II de Bohun est né en 1109, à Melksham, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Humphrey de Bohun I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maud de Salisbury, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret of Gloucester en 1138, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1165, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Humphrey II de Bohun 1109 in Melksham, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Humphrey de Bohun I 30 und seine Mutter Maud de Salisbury 21. Er hat 1138 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England Margaret of Gloucester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1165 im Alter von 56 Jahren und wurde in Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey II de Bohun è nato il nel 1109 nel Melksham, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Humphrey de Bohun I, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Salisbury, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret of Gloucester nel 1138, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1165, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey II de Bohunが1109年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアメルクシャムで生まれた時，父Humphrey de Bohun Iは30歳，母Maud de Salisburyは21歳であった。1138年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードでMargaret of Gloucesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1165年に56歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアランソニー セクウンダ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey II de Bohun(이)가 1109년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 멜크샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey de Bohun I(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Salisbury(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1138년 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 Margaret of Gloucester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1165년 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 랜서니 세쿤다 플리오리에 묻혔다.

mn.Melksham, Wiltshire, England: Melksham, Wiltūnscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Midhurst, Sussex, England: Midhurst, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey II de Bohun nasceu em 1109, em Melksham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Humphrey de Bohun I, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Salisbury, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret of Gloucester em 1138, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1165, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey II de Bohun родился в 1109 г. в местности мелкшам, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Humphrey de Bohun I было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Salisbury, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret of Gloucester в 1138 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1165 г. в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности ллантони секунда приори, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humphrey II de Bohun nació en 1109, en Melksham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Humphrey de Bohun I, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Maud de Salisbury, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret of Gloucester en 1138, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1165, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
